title: gymnogramma aspidioides
intro: Gymnogramma aspidioides, also known as the 'dune fern', is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its leaves and roots are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits such as pain relief and wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further scientific research is needed to validate its efficacy.
